title: Alertas de Infraestrutura — VMs de hospedagem

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  vm.host AS `VM`,
  vm.name AS `Nome`,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ht.value SEPARATOR ', ') FROM host_tag ht WHERE ht.hostid=vm.hostid AND ht.tag='servico') AS `Serviço`,
  t.description AS `Problema`,
  CASE t.priority WHEN '5' THEN 'Disaster' WHEN '4' THEN 'High' WHEN '3' THEN 'Average' WHEN '2' THEN 'Warning' ELSE 'Info' END AS `Severidade`,
  CASE WHEN (UNIX_TIMESTAMP()-t.lastchange) < 86400 THEN 'hoje'
       WHEN (UNIX_TIMESTAMP()-t.lastchange) < 172800 THEN 'há 1 dia'
       ELSE CONCAT('há ', ROUND((UNIX_TIMESTAMP()-t.lastchange)/86400), ' dias') END AS `Idade`
FROM triggers t
INNER JOIN functions f ON f.triggerid=t.triggerid
INNER JOIN items i ON i.itemid=f.itemid
INNER JOIN hosts vm ON vm.hostid=i.hostid
WHERE t.value=1 AND t.status=0
  AND vm.status=0
  AND vm.host NOT LIKE 'app-%'
  AND vm.hostid IN (
    SELECT ht2.hostid FROM host_tag ht2
    WHERE ht2.tag='servico' AND ht2.value IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT ht1.value FROM host_tag ht1
      INNER JOIN hosts_groups hg1 ON hg1.hostid=ht1.hostid AND hg1.groupid=663
      WHERE ht1.tag='servico'
    )
  )
GROUP BY t.triggerid, vm.hostid
ORDER BY t.priority DESC, t.lastchange DESC
